title: Persistent Mining
description: Saves block breaking progress so you can continue mining later.
body:
## Description
Ever wanted to mine obsidian, got **interrupted** by a mob, and had to start all over again? With this mod, you can take a **break** anytime and **continue** mining exactly where you left off.

**Persistent Mining** keeps track of your **progress** for a short time, so you don’t lose it when you stop. The mod is highly **configurable**, letting you adjust how long progress stays, how it behaves, and whether it slowly resets over time. It requires [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) for its configuration.
